change_command: python scripts/apply-not-banana-feedback.py --feedback data/not-banana/feedback/inbox.json --corpus data/not-banana/corpus.json --status-filter approved --max-entries 8 --consume --require-human-review --minimum-human-reviewers 1 --report artifacts/not-banana-feedback/sdlc-apply-report.json && python scripts/train-not-banana-model.py --corpus data/not-banana/corpus.json --output artifacts/not-banana-model --training-profile ci --session-mode single --max-sessions 1 && mkdir -p src/native/core/domain/generated && cp artifacts/not-banana-model/banana_signal_tokens.h src/native/core/domain/generated/banana_signal_tokens.h && python scripts/record-agent-pulse-activity.py --agent banana-classifier-agent --increment-id classifier-feedback-training --intent "Apply approved feedback and refresh classifier vocabulary snapshot"
